<figure class="kg-card kg-gallery-card kg-width-wide">
  <div class="kg-gallery-container">
    <div class="kg-gallery-row">
      <div class="kg-gallery-image"><img src="https://cdn.test/g1.jpg" alt="One" width="600" height="400"></div>
      <div class="kg-gallery-image"><img src="https://cdn.test/g2.jpg" alt="Two" width="600" height="400"></div>
      <div class="kg-gallery-image"><img src="https://cdn.test/g3.jpg" alt="Three" width="600" height="400"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <figcaption>A three-image gallery.</figcaption>
</figure>
